steps.title: Rewrite line p
steps.content:
Put $2y+18x=9$ in slope-intercept form:
$$2y=-18x+9$$
$$y=-9x+\frac{9}{2}$$
So line $p$ has slope $-9$.

steps.title: Use the perpendicular rule
steps.content:
Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals. The negative reciprocal of $-9$ is:
$$-\frac{1}{-9}=\frac{1}{9}$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is the original slope. Choice B has the wrong sign. Choice D is not the reciprocal. Choice C is $\frac{1}{9}$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: The slope of line $r$ is $\frac{1}{9}$, so C is correct.
